description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake generously coated with a thick layer of creamy, textured white icing. The surface and sides display a rustic, hand-applied finish, with visible swirls and peaks characteristic of buttercream frosting. The cake has a soft, slightly uneven silhouette, suggesting a homemade or artisanal style rather than a factory-produced appearance. There are no visible decorations, patterns, or embellishments, making the cake appear plain and minimalist. The cake is not presented on any visible plate, stand, or tray, and no candles or toppers are present. Its overall look is inviting and simple, suitable for casual celebrations or as a classic dessert centerpiece.
description: A round, single-tier cake with thick, textured white icing and a rustic, hand-frosted appearance. The cake is plain with no decorations or visible container.
description_view_0: The cake is seen from a slightly angled side, showing the thick, swirled white icing and a subtle golden tint on the lower left edge.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cake's flat top and the even, creamy white icing with pronounced swirls, with less visible golden tint.
description_view_2: The cake appears more uniformly white from this angle, with the textured icing clearly visible on the sides and top.
description_view_3: A side view with a slight golden hue on the lower right, emphasizing the rustic, uneven icing application.
